leadText: Power Whip (Japanese: パワーウィップ Power Whip) is a damage-dealing Grass-type move introduced in Generation IV. It was TR72 in Pokémon Sword and Shield.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] Power Whip inflicts damage and has no secondary effect. Generation IX [ edit | edit source ] Pokémon Legends: Z-A [ edit | edit source ] Pokémon Legends: Z-A Category Physical Accuracy 100% Standard Plus Move Power 120 144 Cooldown 12s Move wind-up time 20 frames Effect duration —s Additional effect — — — None

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description D P Pt HG SS PBR The user violently whirls its vines or tentacles to harshly lash the foe. B W B2 W2 X Y OR AS The user violently whirls its vines or tentacles to harshly lash the target. S M US UM P E Sw Sh BD SP LA The user violently whirls its vines, tentacles, or the like to harshly lash the target. S V The user violently whirls its vines, tentacles, or the like to lash the target. ZA The user attacks by violently lashing targets with vines, tentacles, or the like.
